summary: AAPL has mixed technical signals, with positive momentum from the 12-day EMA and 5-day return momentum, but weakening momentum from the MACD.
bullish_factors: The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
The stock has positive 5-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
